, // Mid-tier enemies (Lv15-30) '古代ゴーレム': {hp:280,str:38,def:30,spd:6,int:12,ele:'earth',icon:'GOLM',loot:['古代石'],exp:45,gold:22,pos:'front',range:'melee'}, '闇の騎士': {hp:220,str:42,def:22,spd:11,int:18,ele:'dark',icon:'DKNI',loot:['黒鉄片'],exp:50,gold:25,pos:'front',range:'melee'}, '魔法人形': {hp:160,str:20,def:15,spd:9,int:45,ele:'dark',icon:'MAGO',loot:['魔法核'],exp:48,gold:24,pos:'back',range:'ranged'}, '竜の幼生': {hp:200,str:50,def:18,spd:13,int:35,ele:'fire',icon:'DRGL',loot:['龍鱗片'],exp:60,gold:30,pos:'front',range:'melee'}, '烈風の精霊': {hp:150,str:30,def:12,spd:13,int:40,ele:'wind',icon:'WNDP',loot:['風の結晶'],exp:55,gold:28,pos:'back',range:'ranged'}, // High-tier enemies (Lv30-60) '深淵の番人': {hp:450,str:65,def:40,spd:9,int:30,ele:'dark',icon:'ABYS',loot:['深淵の欠片'],exp:90,gold:45,pos:'front',range:'melee'}, '大天使の残像': {hp:380,str:55,def:35,spd:11,int:60,ele:'light',icon:'ARCS',loot:['聖なる羽'],exp:95,gold:48,pos:'back',range:'ranged'}, '混沌の結晶': {hp:500,str:70,def:45,spd:8,int:70,ele:'none',icon:'CHAO',loot:['混沌石'],exp:100,gold:50,pos:'front',range:'melee'}, '時の龍': {hp:600,str:80,def:50,spd:9,int:80,ele:'thunder',icon:'TMDR',loot:['龍時計'],exp:120,gold:60,pos:'front',range:'melee'}, // EXP farming enemies (fast, high EXP, low HP) 'エーテル結晶（小）':{hp:50,str:5,def:2,spd:8,int:5,ele:'none',icon:'ETC',loot:['エーテルチップ'],exp:80,gold:0,pos:'front',range:'melee',dropConsumable:'ether_chip'}, 'エーテル結晶（中）':{hp:80,str:8,def:3,spd:8,int:8,ele:'none',icon:'ETS',loot:['エーテルシャード'],exp:200,gold:0,pos:'front',range:'melee',dropConsumable:'ether_shard'}, 'エーテル結晶（大）':{hp:120,str:12,def:5,spd:8,int:12,ele:'none',icon:'ETG',loot:['エーテルギア'],exp:500,gold:0,pos:'front',range:'melee',dropConsumable:'ether_gear'}, 'エーテルコア結晶': {hp:200,str:20,def:8,spd:8,int:20,ele:'none',icon:'ETX',loot:['エーテルコア'],exp:1500,gold:50,pos:'front',range:'melee',dropConsumable:'ether_core'}, // ── アーティファクト一括強化UI ──────────────────────────────── function calcDustToArtLv(art, targetLv){ const def = ARTIFACT_BY_ID[art.defId]; const rarityMult = {common:0.5, rare:1, epic:1.6, legend:2.8}[def?.rarity||'rare']; let total = 0; for(let lv = art.statLv; lv < targetLv && lv < 50; lv++){ total += Math.max(1, Math.ceil(lv * 2 * rarityMult)); } return total; } function openArtBulkUpgrade(uid, cid){ const art = (G.artifacts||[]).find(a=>a.uid===uid); if(!art) return; const def = ARTIFACT_BY_ID[art.defId]; if(!def) return; const col = getRarityColor(def.rarity); if(art.statLv >= 50){ blog('最大StatLvです','sys'); return; } document.querySelectorAll('.picker-modal').forEach(m=>m.remove()); const modal = document.createElement('div'); modal.className = 'picker-modal'; modal.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:820;background:rgba(0,0,0,.75);display:flex;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:center;padding:0;'; function buildHtml(targetLv){ const have = G.relicDust||0; const need = calcDustToArtLv(art, targetLv); const canDo = have >= need && need > 0; const lvGain = targetLv - art.statLv; return `
${def.icon}
${getRarityLabel(def.rarity)} ${def.name}
メインStat: +${getArtMainStatValue(art)} ${def.mainStat.stat.toUpperCase()} (StatLv${art.statLv}/50)
✧
レリックダスト
所持: ${have}個
目標 StatLv
Lv${targetLv}
${lvGain > 0 ? `StatLv+${lvGain} に必要: レリックダスト×${need}${!canDo?' (不足 '+(need-have)+'個)':''}` : '現在のLvより低いLvは選択できません'}
`; } window._artBulkUid = uid; window._artBulkCid = cid||null; window._artBulkTarget = Math.min(art.statLv + 1, 50); window._artLvAdj = (delta)=>{ window._artBulkTarget = Math.min(50, Math.max(art.statLv+1, window._artBulkTarget+delta)); const m = document.querySelector('.picker-modal'); if(m) m.innerHTML = buildHtml(window._artBulkTarget); }; modal.innerHTML = buildHtml(window._artBulkTarget); document.body.appendChild(modal); } function _doArtBulkUpgrade(uid, cid, targetLv){ const art = (G.artifacts||[]).find(a=>a.uid===uid); if(!art) return; const need = calcDustToArtLv(art, targetLv); if((G.relicDust||0) < need){ blog('レリックダスト不足','sys'); return; } G.relicDust -= need; const from = art.statLv; art.statLv = targetLv; const def = ARTIFACT_BY_ID[art.defId]; blog(`✧ レリックダスト×${need}消費 → ${def?.name} StatLv${from}→${targetLv}！`,'loot'); recomp(); autoSave(); document.querySelectorAll('.picker-modal').forEach(m=>m.remove()); if(cid){ openCharDetail(cid); } else { renderArtifactPage(); } checkAchievements(); }
